summary: Review of changes addressing greptile-apps[bot] review #6 feedback. The diff normalizes API parameter names (policies→token_policies, ttl→token_ttl) for consistency, adds explicit Kubernetes auth config for the management cluster, improves shell quoting for non-generated values in write-bootstrap-secrets.sh, and adds cert-manager Certificate duration/renewBefore fields with operational rationale. All changes are correct, shellcheck passes cleanly, documentation matches code, and the external reviewer's feedback items are fully resolved.

tests_checklist.item: Shellcheck passes with no errors on setup-auth.sh and write-bootstrap-secrets.sh
YAML files are structurally valid for their CRDs
No automated tests exist for bootstrap scripts (infrastructure shell scripts — acceptable for CC-0009 scope)

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing code patterns (bao_exec, log, set -euo pipefail, SPDX headers)
Clear naming — canonical token_policies/token_ttl used consistently
No dead code or commented-out code
Comments explain WHY not WHAT (TLS duration rationale, auth config rationale)

security_checklist.item: No hardcoded secrets in changed files
Shell quoting improved for sh -c command string construction
Kubernetes auth config uses standard in-cluster endpoint and CA cert path
TLS certificate duration reasonable with operational justification
No new VAULT_SKIP_VERIFY or BAO_TOKEN exposure introduced (pre-existing)

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible — targeted fixes, no over-engineering
Management cluster auth config follows standard Vault/OpenBao patterns
cert-manager Certificate fields (duration, renewBefore) are standard spec fields

fail_fast_checklist.item: set -euo pipefail maintained in all scripts

defensive_checklist.item: Non-generated values now single-quoted in sh -c context

suggested_improvements: D3 (minor): The TLS Configuration table in docs/reference/infrastructure/openbao-bootstrap.md:436-443 does not mention the newly added certificate duration (8760h) or renewBefore (720h) values. Consider adding rows to the table for completeness, e.g. 'Certificate duration | 8760h (1 year)' and 'Renewal window | 720h (30 days before expiry)'. The YAML file itself has good inline comments, so this is documentation-only.

D2 (minor): The single-quote wrapping in write-bootstrap-secrets.sh:58 does not handle the theoretical edge case where val itself contains a single quote. This is a pre-existing limitation (the previous code had no quoting at all), all current callers pass safe literals, and the change is strictly better than before. If future callers may pass arbitrary values, consider using printf-based escaping or the standard POSIX single-quote escape pattern (replace ' with '\''). Not actionable now.
next_steps: Merge this branch — all external review feedback items are resolved and the implementation is correct.
